case_title: BERNICE CRAWFORD VS. COLLEEN, CASE MANAGER CALLINAN

docket_entries.description: DEFENDANT COLLEEN CALLINAN DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT ESTABLISH PERSONAL LIABILITY OF THIS DEFENDANT. NOTHING IN THIS ORDER SHALL PREVENT PLAINTIFF FROM MAKING A CLAIM AGAINST OTHER PARTIES WHO MAY BE RESPONSIBLE FOR HER LOSS. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
